Hercules (2014)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $72,688,614Details
International Box Office $170,700,000
Worldwide Box Office $243,388,614
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $9,582,622
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $9,416,204
Total $18,998,826
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Both man and myth, Hercules leads a band of mercenaries to help end a bloody civil war in the land of Thrace and return the rightful king to his throne. A tormented soul from birth, Hercules has the strength of a God but feels the suffering of a human.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$29,800,263 (41.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.44 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:29.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$100,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,595 opening theaters/3,595 max. theaters, 3.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $106,408,299

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 25th, 2014 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
July 25th, 2014 (IMAX) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: July 23rd, 2014 (Wide) (Philippines)
July 23rd, 2014 (Wide) (Iceland)
July 24th, 2014 (Wide) (Australia)
July 24th, 2014 (Wide) (Taiwan)
July 24th, 2014 (Wide) (Thailand)
Video Release: November 4th, 2014 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for epic battle sequences, violence, suggestive comments, brief strong anguage and partial nudity.
(Rating bulletin 2331, 7/16/2014)
Running Time: 97 minutes
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Post-production Conversion, IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Death of a Son or Daughter, Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, Dysfunctional Family, Mercenaries, War
Social setting: Sword and Sandal
Source material: Independent/Other Comics
Subgenre: Heroic Adventure
Source:Based on Folk Tale/Legend/Fairytale
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production/Financing Companies: Flynn Picture Company, Radical Studios
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Both man and myth, Hercules leads a band of mercenaries to help end a bloody civil war in the land of Thrace and return the rightful king to his throne. A tormented soul from birth, Hercules has the strength of a God but feels the suffering of a human.
